name: kanteen
description: Kanteen — offline PWA for Kanboard with local editing and sync-on-reconnect.
author: Zarafy Labs

scripts.kanboard:deploy: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'npm run build && tar -czf - --exclude=node_modules --exclude=src --exclude=".env*" --exclude=.git . | ssh ${KANBOARD_HOST:?Set KANBOARD_HOST=user@host in .env.local} "docker exec -i kanboard sh -c \"rm -rf /var/www/app/plugins/Kanteen; mkdir -p /var/www/app/plugins/Kanteen && tar -xzf - -C /var/www/app/plugins/Kanteen\""'
